ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application the model is used for */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES training_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of train/test/validation splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metrics belong to */,
  "digit" INTEGER /* Digit or class for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model for the class */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model for the class */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model for the class */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were created */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* JSON object storing the confusion matrix */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the version */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used for the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash for version control */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes on what changes were made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES training_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first model in the comparison */,
  "version_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first model version in the comparison */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second model in the comparison */,
  "version_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second model version in the comparison */,
  "comparison_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing the comparison metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comparison was created */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_version_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("version_id_1") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_version_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("version_id_2") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
